questions: What is the Meta Ads learning phase?
How do we exit the learning phase quickly?
qa.answer: The learning phase is when delivery explores to find efficient conversions. Performance is unstable until enough optimization events occur. Exiting requires sufficient volume and minimized disruptive edits.
implication: Target ~50+ optimization events per ad set per week.
Consolidate ad sets; avoid frequent major changes (budget, bid, targeting).
Use broader targeting and simpler structures to accumulate signal.
